title: IT Infrastructure Engineer
description:
Key Responsibilities

  • Configure, maintain, and upgrade servers, networks, and related hardware and software
  • Perform IT asset management and maintain accurate, up-to-date asset records
  • Conduct day-to-day infrastructure health checks and security monitoring
  • Troubleshoot infrastructure and network-related issues and provide timely resolutions
  • Perform change management activities, ensuring all changes are properly tracked and documented
  • Respond to service requests and incidents in accordance with defined SLAs
  • Coordinate with external service providers and vendors to ensure service levels are met
  • Automate routine operational tasks using basic scripting (Bash, PowerShell) and high-level programming languages (e.g. Python, Perl)
  • Support the provisioning and delivery of IT infrastructure projects and perform other ad-hoc duties as assigned

Requirements:

  • Diploma or Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or a related discipline
  • Minimum 2 years of relevant working experience
  • Strong troubleshooting skills with the ability to analyse logs and trace issues methodically 
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving capabilities 
  • Able to work independently as well as collaboratively in a team environment  
  • Proactive mindset with a willingness to learn new technologies and tools to drive continuous improvement

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Interested applicants kindly click on “apply now” or send your updated resume to jayden.kua@peopleprofilers.com

Jayden Kua Jing Yu

postedCompany.description:
Since our humble beginnings in 2002, People Profilers has steadily grown from strength to strength. Our expertise in providing Human Capital consultancy to our clients – universally sought after skills and expertise in just about any sector– has allowed People Profilers to leave an imprint across various industries and build a reputation for competency and expertise.

 

What differentiates People Profilers from every other recruiter is our unwavering commitment to building relationships with our clients- understanding exactly what our clients are after, and allowing us to match their precise needs. We deliver human capital solutions that allow organisations and their employees to succeed.

 

Here at People Profilers, we pride ourselves on being a one-stop human capital solutions provider for your organisation. Our innovative and relationship-focused workforce solutions have been provided across a wide range of industries.
